enrichment.summary: Kyle records a New Year's Day 2017 vlog from Boulder, explaining that he spent the night fixing conversion errors in his website project caused by being high ('Stoney Logic'). He discusses the time-consuming nature of building his large website, plans to print Google Earth cycling imagery to cover his walls, and estimates the project will take one to two more years to complete.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Building a big website takes far longer than people realize and requires constant revision
Reduced capacity means the project will likely take two more years instead of one
Mentions 'Stoney Logic' as the cause of his errors but also expresses gratitude for it at the end
